facts.source: DBS Group Holdings FY2024 Annual Report
facts.context: Group NIM for the full year 2024 was 2.14%, compared to 2.16% in 2023.

facts.source: DBS Group Holdings FY2024 Annual Report
facts.context: NPL ratio stood at 1.1% as at 31 December 2024.

facts.source: DBS Group Holdings FY2024 Annual Report
facts.context: CET1 ratio was 14.8%, well above the regulatory minimum.

facts.source: DBS Group Holdings FY2024 Annual Report
facts.context: Total income rose 10% to SGD 22,269 million in 2024.

facts.source: DBS Group Holdings FY2024 Annual Report
facts.context: Net profit reached a record SGD 11,289 million for 2024.

facts.source: DBS Group Holdings FY2024 Annual Report
facts.context: Return on equity was 18.0% for the full year 2024.
